name: Pharmacy Store — health & wellness flyer
description: Clean white and teal pharmacy promo: headline PHARMACY STORE, wellness paragraph, contact arrow banner with phone and URL, pharmacist aisle photo with circular pills inset, rounded UI accents.
clipDescription: Left column: teal circles logo, title, body copy, teal CONTACT US strip with phone and site. Right: rounded photo of pharmacist in aisle; circular capsule close-up overlap; top-right star and menu dots.
annotations: Header (top left): three teal circles + “PHARMACY STORE” in bold teal caps
Top right: light grey pill with hollow star (favorite) and triple-dot menu
Body: black sans-serif paragraph on wellness, prescriptions, vitamins, personal care
Bottom left: wide teal arrow banner — CONTACT US, phone +123-456-7890, www.reallygreatsite.com
Right: tall rounded photo of pharmacist in white coat; circular inset of blue/white capsules
Decor: teal curved shapes framing the photo block

name: Larana Travel — hero landing
description: Travel agency hero: airplane window view over ocean and islands, dark nav with plane logo, HOME / ABOUT / MORE, large white headline and subhead on photo, boarding-pass and compass line art overlays.
clipDescription: Full-bleed wing and sea photo; semi-transparent top nav; bottom-left white headline “Exploring the World…”; white ticket and compass illustrations.
annotations: Nav bar: airplane icon + “LARANA TRAVEL”; links HOME (active), ABOUT; MORE button with star and dots
Hero copy (bottom left): “Exploring the World, Expanding the Mind” + sub “The Beauty and Benefits of Travel”
Background: wing over deep blue sea, islands, clouds
Overlays: white line-art boarding pass (top left), compass rose (top right)

name: Flight Academy — bold aviation poster
description: Bright sky-blue poster with oversized white FLIGHT / ACADEMY type; white commercial jet woven through letterforms; small wing emblem top-left; star button top-right; footer lorem placeholder lines.
clipDescription: Center: white jet at diagonal through huge FLIGHT ACADEMY words for depth; top-left logo; top-right rounded button with star outline.
annotations: Background: solid vibrant blue field
Typography: “FLIGHT” and “ACADEMY” in large white caps; plane fuselage and wings layered in front/behind letters
Top left: small white wing / eagle emblem
Top right: rounded control with star icon (matches card star affordance)
Footer: three lines of small centered placeholder copy

name: Fauget Airlines — boarding pass
description: Landscape boarding pass template: dark blue FAUGET AIRLINES branding, BOARDING PASS title, vertical barcode, passenger and flight fields, dashed tear line to stub with repeated info and premium crown badge.
clipDescription: Left main panel: map watermark, barcode in U-frame, AARON LOEB, NEW YORK–CALIFORNIA, AB123, date, gate B22, time 14:00, seat 12B. Right stub mirrors key fields; orange crown icon.
annotations: Header: plane icon + “FAUGET AIRLINES” + large “BOARDING PASS”
Left: vertical barcode in navy frame; grey world map texture behind fields
Fields: passenger name, From/To, flight AB123, 15 MARCH, Gate B22, Boarding 14:00, Seat 12B
Vertical dashed separator before stub
Stub: condensed repeat of itinerary; small orange crown (premium) on stub

name: Chicken Biryani — food delivery square
description: High-contrast red and yellow square ad: vertical yellow stripe, hero bowl of biryani with motion lines, fork/knife pin logo, CHICKEN BIRYANI title, FREE DELIVERY + phone, 30% discount cloud, ORDER NOW button.
clipDescription: Center: bowl of rice and chicken on yellow band; red textured field; discount bubble; CTA strip at bottom.
annotations: Top left: location pin with fork/knife (delivery / restaurant mark)
Title: “CHICKEN BIRYANI” bold black across top
Middle left: “FREE DELIVERY” + phone + hand-drawn arrow toward food
Middle right: yellow cloud badge “Discount 30% OFF”
Bottom: variant copy (chicken, beef, vegetarian) and dark red ORDER NOW button
Hero: ceramic bowl with biryani, drumsticks, herbs; white speed lines

name: Warner & Spencer — fried chicken franchise promo
description: High-energy franchise marketing layout: bold red field, yellow headline box, fried chicken hero with flame and lightning accents, cartoon chicken logo, and partnership keywords for food-service expansion.
clipDescription: Left: logo and BUSINESS FRANCHISE headline in yellow box with purple border; yellow pill with Expansion Partnership Growth; right: plated fried chicken with flames and floating drumstick; footer URL.
annotations: Brand (top left): cartoon chicken mascot + “Warner & Spencer” wordmark in white sans-serif
Headline: “BUSINESS FRANCHISE” in large yellow caps inside a thin purple-outlined box
Keywords: “Expansion • Partnership • Growth” on a rounded yellow pill
Hero (right): crispy fried chicken pile on a plate, flame graphics, lightning accents; floating drumstick top-right
Footer: placeholder URL www.reallygreatsite.com in small white type

name: Borcelle — gift delivery flyer
description: Warm beige flyer for a parcel gift service: delivery truck + globe mark, bold “DELIVERED” headline, value bullets, large 3D cardboard box with shipping pictograms, and envelope-to-map-pin journey graphic.
clipDescription: Split layout: beige background; left heavy 3D box with barcode and fragile/dry/up icons; right stacked headline YOUR SPECIAL GIFT / DELIVERED, bullets, dashed path from envelope to pin, CONTACT US.
annotations: Brand (top left): globe + truck icon with “Borcelle” wordmark
Headline (top right): “YOUR SPECIAL GIFT” in brown; “DELIVERED” emphasized in dark red
Value lines: easy ordering, quality, occasions — right-aligned brown sans-serif
Hero (bottom left): large angled cardboard box with barcode and shipping symbols (fragile, keep dry, this side up)
Journey graphic (bottom right): dashed path from envelope to map pin; “CONTACT US!” and site URL

name: Warner & Spencer — introduction slide
description: Deep red slide template: cartoon chicken logo + Warner & Spencer wordmark, large INTRODUCTION headline, two columns of white body copy, hero fried drumstick with flame wrap on the right, corner flame accents, footer URL.
clipDescription: Left: circular chicken mascot logo, INTRODUCTION title, lorem paragraphs. Right: photoreal drumstick with fire. Bottom: reallygreatsite.com; small chicken peek bottom-left.
annotations: Top left: round logo — cartoon chicken with bowtie + spoon beside “Warner & Spencer” in white
Center left: “INTRODUCTION” in large white caps; two blocks of white placeholder body text
Right: large crispy drumstick with realistic orange/yellow flames
Corners: flame wisps top-left and bottom-right framing the layout
Footer: www.reallygreatsite.com in small white; extra chicken piece bottom edge

name: Yumm Chick — About Us split
description: Split vertical layout: left photo of fried chicken spilling from bucket with tomatoes and dipping sauces; right deep red panel with ABOUT US, Yumm Chick logo, lorem body, Page 04 badge, yellow teardrop motifs, footer URL.
clipDescription: Left: tipped bucket, chicken pile, condiment bowls, tomatoes; white logo on food. Right: white rounded ABOUT US, yellow circle chicken mark + Yumm Chick, teardrops along inner edge.
annotations: Left: tipped bucket spilling drumsticks; red tomatoes; wooden board with red/yellow sauce cups; striped napkin
Right top: circular “Page 04” badge with yellow ring
Center right: large “ABOUT US” then Yumm Chick logo (yellow disc + chicken silhouette) and white lorem text
Right edge: vertical column of yellow teardrop shapes; small curved yellow accent bottom-right
Footer: www.reallygreatsite.com centered in white

name: Digital Bank — innovation slide
description: Dark fintech slide: date top-left, DIGITAL / BANK stacked headline in orange and white, subtitle on innovation, APPLY NOW and star/menu chrome, hand holding credit card center, inset laptop scene, review avatars and 01 page marker.
clipDescription: Black background with orange glows; left big type; right small rounded photo; foreground hand + card back; bottom 1.2K REVIEW + 01.
annotations: Top left: “12 DESEMBER 2025” in white
Top right: orange APPLY NOW pill; circular star; hamburger and ellipsis controls
Headline: “DIGITAL” orange / “BANK” white; subtitle on innovation, benefits, challenges
Center: close-up hand holding card (mag stripe visible); inset top-right: person with laptop + card
Bottom right: placeholder caption, two avatars + “1.2K REVIEW”; large “01” corner

name: Future of Finance — green card promo
description: Bright green vertical ad: TRACK / MANAGE / SAVE lines, site URL, large WELCOME TO THE FUTURE OF FINANCE headline, tilted gradient credit card with chip and numbers, driftwood and coral props at base.
clipDescription: Green field; black four-arrow icon under URL; angled card with YOUR NAME HERE; wood and coral bottom styling.
annotations: Top left: stacked “TRACK. MANAGE. SAVE.” in bold white
Top right: REALLYGREATSITE.COM + minimalist four-arrows icon
Center: multi-line headline “WELCOME TO THE FUTURE OF FINANCE”
Middle: tilted card — “credit”, chip, contactless, masked PAN, VALID DATES 00/00, YOUR NAME HERE
Bottom: diagonal driftwood, white coral cluster, small stone

name: Borcelle — stacked credit cards
description: Blue marketing graphic: Borcelle Company header, Upgrade Your Lifestyle / Credit Card headline in yellow and white, three thick 3D credit cards staggered (black, yellow, lavender) with chips and numbers, hex pattern corners.
clipDescription: Centered headline stack; three rounded 3D cards diagonal; each shows Credit card label, numbers, colored bottom stripe.
annotations: Top: “Borcelle Company” — Borcelle yellow, Company white
Headline: “Upgrade” + “Credit Card” in bold yellow; connecting lines in white
Cards (front to back): matte black with yellow chip and yellow footer bar; bright yellow card; light purple card — each with chip, contactless, numbers
Background: medium blue with faint hex outlines in corners

name: Rimberio Bank — loan campaign
description: Vertical bank ad: purple-pink gradient photo overlay on handshake, RIMBERIO BANK + tagline, top-right star and menu, large lime-to-cyan speech bubble “Borrow money up to $1,000.”, navy footer with terms, APPLY FOR LOAN NOW button, gold crown badge.
clipDescription: Top: desk handshake under purple overlay; middle: gradient speech bubble; bottom: dashed navy texture, gradient blue CTA, crown.
annotations: Top: handshake across desk with purple/pink wash; “RIMBERIO BANK” + secure trusted tagline in white
Top right: faint star and ellipsis in rounded pill (favorites / more)
Center: big rounded bubble — green-to-blue gradient, white “Borrow money up to $1,000.”
Bottom: navy dashed pattern; “Terms & Conditions apply.” + URL left
Bottom right: light blue gradient “APPLY FOR LOAN NOW” button; small gold crown icon outside

name: Ingoude Company — pharmacy service banner
description: Square blue-and-white pharmacy promo: mortar-and-pestle + Ingoude Company logo, pharmacist photo top-right, halftone and curved S-shapes, 24/7 Hours Open badge, Pharmacy Store serif headline, wellness tagline, Contact Us pill, dot grid accent.
clipDescription: Curved blue panels; top split logo vs photo; center white ring badge; bottom solid blue band with serif title and Contact Us button.
annotations: Top left: blue mortar + pestle with + mark; “Ingoude Company” wordmark
Top right: pharmacist in white coat behind counter with product box and slip
Center: white circle badge — “24/7” + “Hours Open” on halftone dot field with curved frames
Bottom: large white serif “Pharmacy Store”; italic subline on trusted health, wellness, lab
Bottom right: light pill “Contact Us” in blue; decorative dot grid corner

name: Fradel and Spies — dental pharmacy promo
description: Square ad: cart+gear logo and Fradel and Spies name, huge teal DENTAL PHARMACY headline, trust paragraph, SHOP NOW teal button, blurred pharmacy aisle background, 3D cart with bottles and large molar prop.
clipDescription: Left: headline stack and CTA; soft-focus shelves behind; bottom-right: miniature cart, red-cap bottles with crosses, glossy tooth model.
annotations: Top left: shopping cart with gear icon + “Fradel and Spies” in black
Hero: “DENTAL PHARMACY” in bold teal caps
Body: one-stop dental and oral health paragraph in black
CTA: rounded teal “SHOP NOW” with white icon + text
Foreground: silver cart on teal surface; three white bottles with red caps and plus labels; large white molar

name: Air Travel — online agency logo
description: White-background logo mark: light blue globe with white continents, dark blue airplane with four curved flight paths wrapping the globe, light blue arc frames, AIR TRAVEL + ONLINE AGENCY wordmark.
clipDescription: Centered icon: globe + plane trails; stacked caps text below in two blues.
annotations: Icon: circular globe (light blue) with simplified white landmasses
Plane: dark blue silhouette upper-right with motion trails curving around globe
Framing: thin light blue partial rings left and right of globe
Type: “AIR TRAVEL” bold dark blue; “ONLINE AGENCY” smaller lighter blue with letterspacing

name: plusplus pharmacy — brand logo
description: White-background logo: rounded cross/plus mark with blue-to-cyan gradients and layered intersection; stacked wordmark “plusplus pharmacy” in vibrant blue lowercase.
clipDescription: Left: two overlapping pill bars forming plus; right: two-line lowercase sans title.
annotations: Icon: horizontal bar gradient medium blue → light cyan; vertical bar light cyan → medium blue; darker blue overlap at center
Wordmark: “plusplus” / “pharmacy” stacked, bold rounded sans, solid blue
Layout: icon left, text right; clean white field

name: Chicken Wings — brand logo
description: Square red field: white line-art chicken head/neck, bold CHICKEN in rounded sans, WINGS in script, arched tagline Best wings in town — all white on red.
clipDescription: Centered vertical stack: illustration, bold sans, script, small curved tagline.
annotations: Top: minimalist white outline chicken head and neck
Middle: “Chicken” bold rounded white caps; “Wings” white script below
Bottom: small curved sans tagline “Best wings in town”
Background: solid vibrant red square

name: Cafe Fauget — Special Coffee menu
description: Vertical flyer: cream field with coffee leaf/bean line art; huge orange script “Coffee” header; three iced drinks in cups (Americano, Vanilla Latte, Lemon Tea) with prices, Best Seller starbursts; mini list (Iced Chocolate, Cappuccino, Iced Tea); CAFE FAUGET ovals and address; scattered orange stars; premium crown badge corner.
clipDescription: Top: Special + script Coffee; middle: three plastic cups with badges; bottom-right: caps price list; footer: twin oval logos + street line.
annotations: Header: “Special” small orange sans above oversized orange script “Coffee”
Drinks row: Iced Americano ($2.99) with Best Seller burst; Iced Vanilla Latte ($3.99); Iced Lemon Tea ($3.99) with Best Seller — each “Favorite Coffee at The Fauget Cafe”
Secondary list: ICED CHOCOLATE $4.99, CAPPUCCINO $2.99, ICED TEA $2.99
Footer: two orange oval “CAFE FAUGET” locks flanking “CAFE LOCATION / 123 ANYWHERE ST., ANY CITY”
Background: subtle botanical line art; small orange star sparkles; bottom-right dark circle with gold crown (premium template)

name: Coffee Menu — split photo + list
description: Landscape menu: left ~40% hero photo of mug, book, and knit blanket with cream badge “menu / Coffee”; right beige panel with four rows — AMERICANO, LATTE, BLACK ORANGE, MOCHA — each with square drink photo, lorem description, vertical rule, and serif price ($5–$9).
clipDescription: Flex split: lifestyle still-life left; ruled rows with thumbnails and prices right.
annotations: Left: cozy flat-lay — knit, open book, green cup and spoon; overlay badge “menu” over “Coffee” in cream rounded rect
Right: four horizontal rules; each row = square drink thumb, bold caps name, three lines lorem, | divider, large $ price
Items: AMERICANO $5, LATTE $6, BLACK ORANGE $8, MOCHA $9 (partial)
Palette: earthy beige panel (#E5E1D8 style) vs muted photo tones

name: Coffee Cafe — discount promo
description: Cafe discount flyer: tan and black layout with coffee photography — pour-over brewing, latte art cup, iced drink hero; Coffee Cafe script header; SPECIAL DISCOUNT and 30% OFF badge; indulgent promo copy on black panel; limited-time offer footer.
clipDescription: Grid of brew and drink photos; large discount circle; white type on black for body copy; cafe branding corner.
annotations: In progress: promotional cafe flyer with 30% off offer
Photo grid: pour-over, latte art, iced coffee with beans
Discount badge and SPECIAL DISCOUNT headline
Footer: offer validity and terms

name: Massive Global Sale — airline poster
description: Airline sale poster: bright blue sky with diagonal commercial wing; bold MASSIVE GLOBAL SALE typography; 50% off flights offer; seat reservation strip; contact phone and website in footer blocks.
clipDescription: Photographic wing on blue; stacked headline blocks; GET 50% OFF outline; black footer with MORE INFORMATION.
annotations: In progress: vertical flight sale creative
Hero: jet wing over clear blue sky
Headline: MASSIVE / GLOBAL SALE with bordered type
CTA: seat reservation and contact strip
